title: [release-1.40] [CI:DOCS] compare to this release branch
body:

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
The centos-stream-10 errors are all of the `go: go.mod requires go >= 1.23.3 (running go 1.23.1; GOTOOLCHAIN=local)` variety.
